revision.text: {{polluted category}} {{All included|disambiguation pages|pages}} {{cmbox| |type=notice |text=This category includes {{sigfig|{{#expr:{{PAGESINCATEGORY:All disambiguation pages|R}}*100/{{NUMBEROFARTICLES:R}}}}|3}}% of all Wikipedia articles. }} {{Wikipedia category|tracking=yes|description=The pages in this category are [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation|disambiguation]] pages. It enables us to use {{PAGESINCATEGORY:All disambiguation pages}} to get the exact number of disambiguation pages in Wikipedia. To add a page to this category, tag it with a [[:Category:Disambiguation message boxes|disambiguation template]] (templates built with the {{tl|dmbox}} meta-template, which does the actual categorising).|hidden=yes| This category lists disambiguation pages in all namespaces. (For technical reasons it does not list pages in the template namespace, these are instead found in [[:Category:Template disambiguation pages]].) }} {{CollapsibleLargeCategoryTOC}} {{DEFAULTSORT:All Disambiguation Pages}} {{wikidata link|Q9700479}} [[en:Category:All disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Disambiguation pages| All]]
